results.definition_en: A male child of a parent.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 兒子;雙親的男性子嗣。
results.example_en: Her son is just five years old.

results.definition_en: Words set to music to be sung.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 歌曲;可唱的、配上樂曲的詞句。
results.example_en: She sang a soft song to the baby.
results.example_zh_tw: 她對寶寶輕輕哼了首歌。

results.definition_en: A kind or group of things that are the same in some way.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 種類、類型;相似事物的分群。
results.example_en: What sort of bird is that?

results.definition_en: What one hears with the ears.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 聲音;耳朵所聞之物。
results.example_en: The sound of the wind was loud.

results.definition_en: A thin liquid food made by boiling meat or plants in water.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 湯;以肉或蔬菜熬煮的稀薄食物。
results.example_en: Have a bowl of hot soup.

results.definition_en: An empty place between things; or the great empty above the sky.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 空間;物體間的空處或天外的浩瀚之處。
results.example_en: There is no space in the box for more.
results.example_zh_tw: 箱子裡沒地方再放東西了。

results.definition_en: A high flat place where one acts in a play; or a step in a process.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 舞台、階段;表演場地或過程中的一步。
results.example_en: She walked onto the stage.

results.definition_en: The first part of a thing; or the act of going from rest to motion.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 開始、起點;事物的初始或由靜轉動之刻。
results.example_en: We made an early start to the day.
results.example_zh_tw: 我們今天很早就開始了。

results.definition_en: Something said or written to give a fact or view.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 陳述、聲明;以言或文表達事實或看法。
results.example_en: She made a clear statement of her plan.
results.example_zh_tw: 她清楚地說出了她的計畫。

results.definition_en: Water made into a gas by being very hot.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 蒸氣;水被加熱化為氣體之物。
results.example_en: Steam came from the hot tea.

results.definition_en: A very hard, strong metal made from iron.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鋼;以鐵製成的高強度堅硬金屬。
results.example_en: The bridge is made of steel.

results.definition_en: A foot put down once in walking; or a stage in a process.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 步伐、步驟;行走時一腳下落或過程中的一步。
results.example_en: Take one step to the right, please.

results.definition_en: One loop of thread made by a needle.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 縫線、針腳;以針線縫成的一個線圈。
results.example_en: The dress has a small stitch on the side.

results.definition_en: A hard piece of rock.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 石頭、石塊;堅硬的岩石碎塊。
results.example_en: Do not throw a stone at the bird.

results.definition_en: An act of no longer moving or going on.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 停止、停下;不再移動或繼續。
results.example_en: The bus came to a sudden stop.

results.definition_en: Words that tell of things that happened, true or made up.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 故事、敘事;敘述事件的文字，可為真或虛構。
results.example_en: Read me a story before bed.

results.definition_en: An act of making a thing longer or wider by pulling.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 伸展、拉長;拉動使物變長或變寬。
results.example_en: Give your arms a long stretch.

results.definition_en: The way the parts of a thing are put together; or a building.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 結構;事物各部分的組合方式或一座建築。
results.example_en: The structure of the house is very strong.
results.example_zh_tw: 這棟房子的結構很堅固。

results.definition_en: What a thing is made of; the material.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 物質、本體;事物之構成材料。
results.example_en: Gold is a heavy substance.
results.example_zh_tw: 黃金是一種很重的物質。

results.definition_en: A sweet white stuff put on or in food to give it a sweet taste.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 糖;用於甜化食物的白色甜物。
results.example_en: Put some sugar in your tea.

results.definition_en: An idea put forward for others to think about.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 建議、提議;提出供人思考的想法。
results.example_en: I made a suggestion at the meeting.
results.example_zh_tw: 我在會議上提了個建議。

results.definition_en: The hot time of the year, between spring and autumn.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 夏天、夏季;介於春秋之間的炎熱時節。
results.example_en: We go to the sea every summer.
results.example_zh_tw: 我們每年夏天都去海邊。

results.definition_en: A thing or person that keeps another up or helps it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 支撐、支持;維持或助益他者之物或人。
results.example_en: The pole gives support to the roof.

results.definition_en: A feeling one has when something happens that one did not look for.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 驚訝、意外;對未預期之事所生的感覺。
results.example_en: Her visit was a great surprise.

results.definition_en: An act of moving through water by using the arms and legs.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 游泳;以四肢在水中移動。
results.example_en: Let us go for a swim in the sea.
